use_cases: Display multiple subscription tiers with features for SaaS products
Toggle between monthly and annual billing cycles with automatic discount calculation
Compare plans side-by-side with feature lists for informed purchasing decisions
Drive conversions with clear pricing tiers and CTAs
ai_summary: A responsive pricing section component featuring three subscription tiers (Basic, Business, Enterprise) with a monthly/annual billing cycle toggle. Includes gradient-styled pricing cards, feature lists per plan, and automatic price calculation for annual billing with 20% discount. Designed for SaaS and subscription-based products with responsive text and layout support.
